title: Karnataka High Court refuses to ban tiger safaris in State
description: The Karnataka High Court on Wednesday declined to impose an immediate ban on tiger safaris in the State.However, it directed the State government to file a reply to a plea seeking a permanent ban on tiger safaris within critical tiger habitats on the ground that such activities contravene established conservation norms.A Bench of Chief Justice (CJ) Vibhu Bakhru and Justice CM Poonacha sought a detailed affidavit clarifying the demarcation of core, buffer and tourism zones, the exact locations wh
